title: The Oil World Is Splintering — And America Has The Backup Plan
summary: The 2026 Iran war has significantly impacted the global energy landscape, leading to a reordering of oil supply chains due to the Strait of Hormuz lockdown and a billion-barrel supply loss. This shift has also benefited Russia, which is rerouting discounted fuel to Saudi Arabia and increasing cooperation with India to strengthen new supply chains.
